name: Jellyfin Helper
description: Cleans up orphaned .trickplay folders, empty media folders, and orphaned subtitles. Provides media library statistics with audio codec analysis, export, caching, historical trends, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr), and a multi-language dashboard (en, de, fr, es, pt, zh, tr).
overview: Automated cleanup (trickplay, empty folders, subtitles), media statistics with export/trends, trash bin, Arr integration, and multi-language dashboard.

versions.changelog: Critical bugfix: Music and Boxset/Collection libraries are now automatically excluded from all cleanup tasks, preventing incorrect deletion of music folders and Jellyfin collection metadata. Test coverage increased to 181 tests.

Added orphaned subtitle cleaner, trash/recycle bin, Arr stack integration (Radarr/Sonarr comparison), multi-language dashboard (en/de/fr/es/pt/zh/tr), library whitelist/blacklist, orphan minimum age, cleanup tracking, audio codec analysis, JSON/CSV export, historical trend graph, caching, rate limiting, input validation, and comprehensive test coverage (178 tests).
Breaking changes: Renamed to Jellyfin Helper. Added media library statistics page. Trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, dry-run modes.
Initial version with trickplay folder cleanup, empty media folder cleanup, and dry-run modes for both.
